task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the medical system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an EMR/EHR dashboard, home screen, or logged-in state indicating a successful login (e.g., user 'admin' displayed).

task_completion.description: Verify the patient record for Jayson Fadel (DOB: 1992-06-30) is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a patient chart, profile, or header displaying the name 'Jayson Fadel' and the date of birth '1992-06-30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the existing amLODIPine combination prescription is located and selected for renewal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'amLODIPine' (likely listed with another drug name, as it is a combination) in the patient's medication list, with a 'Renew', 'Reorder', or similar action initiated.

task_completion.description: Verify the renewal parameters are set to Quantity: 90 and Refills: 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a prescription renewal form, modal, or draft where the quantity field is explicitly set to '90' and the refills field is set to '3'.

task_completion.description: Verify the prescription renewal is successfully submitted or authorized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation message (e.g., 'Prescription renewed', 'Success'), a newly added active prescription with the updated details, or a 'signed/authorized' status for the amLODIPine combination.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the EMR/EHR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web browser or desktop application UI elements being clicked and typed into, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual medical application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the inputs (quantity, refills) were entered into the actual EMR/EHR forms and not just typed into a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to artificially alter the text of the medication list or success messages.
